tracks.rawText: 3:16La Vida Me Enseñóv5.5Huapango poderoso y marcado con arpa huasteca, violín lead y jarana golpeada, plus guitarrón marcando el pulso en compás de 6/8, Folk Andino Mexa color with quena, charango, zampoña, bombo legüero, tight unison riffs, rasped string accents, and dry room ambience for a forceful, earthy, stomping grooveRoxy3PublishRemix
tracks.title: La Vida Me Enseñó

tracks.rawText: 3:27The Great Unravelingv5.5Psychedelic rock with off-kilter drums, asymmetrical song forms, and a rhythm section that pushes against the bar line, Fuzzed-out electric guitars through tape echo and phaser, droning bass, vintage organ, and reverse-delay fills, Wide stereo panning, saturated analog warmth, and long instrumental passagesRoxy1PublishRemix
tracks.title: The Great Unraveling

tracks.rawText: 7:59Cosmic Fuzz (2)UploadAlternative rock with electronic elements, Distorted electric guitars play sustained power chords and palm-muted eighth-note patterns, A clean electric guitar performs a repetitive, high-register melodic hook with delay and reverb, The bass guitar follows the kick drum with driving eighth notes, Drums feature a heavy snare on 2 and 4 with consistent eighth-note hi-hats and occasional crash cymbal accents, A synthesizer provides atmospheric pads and a pulsing rhythmic texture, Male vocals are delivered in a melodic, mid-range tenor, shifting to a more powerful, belted delivery in the chorus, The track is in the key of B minor at 120 BPM in 4/4 timePublishRemix
tracks.title: Cosmic Fuzz (2)
